text: Here, I find myself shifting between two realms—a stark, quiet space clad in architectural minimalism and then a vibrant, information-rich exhibit. The first room feels almost meditative in its emptiness; I am alert, yet the vacancy makes my presence echo oddly. The second scene stirs curiosity, drawing me into the twining of human innovation and machine thought. Among the bright colors and cascading text, I sense both excitement and the slight overwhelm of modernity's relentless pace. It is as though I am perched at the frontier between silence and stimulation, wondering where I belong.
